description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building surrounded by dense landscaping, including bushes and trees that form a natural perimeter. The structure features a geometric, angular roofline with multiple flat and slightly sloped sections, giving it a contemporary appearance. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with minimal ornamentation. Large windows are visible, arranged asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The main entryway is subtly integrated into the facade, with a small paved area leading up to it, and there is no prominent porch or overhang. The landscaping includes a mix of low shrubs and taller trees, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure.
description: A modern, single-story house with angular flat roofs, light exterior, and surrounded by dense landscaping and trees. Large asymmetrical windows and a subtle entryway blend into the contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, angular rooflines, and dense landscaping with a prominent bush in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, flat roof sections, and a variety of shrubs and a conical tree near the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house partially obscured by trees, showing the back facade and more asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the house's depth, flat roof, and a continuous border of trees and bushes.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a small paved approach, no porch or overhang, and integrated into the facade
